evidence: turn-arbiter.ts:71-72 declares `private latestInterimText = ""` / `private latestInterimConfidence: number | null = null` as INSTANCE fields, not module-level globals (the only module global is BACKCHANNELS at line 28). One TurnArbiter is constructed per VoiceAgentSession (voice-agent-session.ts:283), so the scope is per-session, spanning multiple turns. Kimi's 'module-level globals' framing is factually wrong, but the underlying cross-turn-leak concern is real. The value is set on every STT interim/result (voice-agent-session.ts:568,585 -> noteInterimEvidence) and read only inside tryCommit (turn-arbiter.ts:205-209). It is cleared on every suppress (255-256) and on the successful-commit branch (235-236), but the commit path's 'gate_resolved_after_tts_end' early-return (217-222) sets idle WITHOUT clearing interim, and transitionToPending (167-180) overwrites a still-pending turn without clearing it. Combined with STT lagging VAD, tryCommit can fire (via onSpeechActivity 100-101 / observeBargeInAudio 134-136) for turn N+1 before any fresh STT interim for N+1 arrives, reading turn N's stale confidence/text at line 205 and wrongly emitting suppressed_low_confidence / suppressed_backchannel. clear() (157-158) only runs on session close (voice-agent-session.ts:384). So the leak is real but narrow/timing-dependent, not the broad always-on global Kimi implies.
real_fix: Move latestInterimText/latestInterimConfidence into the pending interruption state (or a per-userContextId map) so a barge-in evaluation only reads STT evidence captured for THAT pending turn. Concretely: (a) add `latestInterimText`/`latestInterimConfidence` (or a contextId-keyed map) and in noteInterimEvidence accept/track the contextId of the interim so tryCommit reads only evidence whose contextId === pending.userContextId, ignoring stale prior-turn evidence; and (b) clear the interim fields on the line 217 'gate_resolved_after_tts_end' early-return too, so the only remaining leak surface (transitionToPending overwrite + STT lag) is closed. Minimal safe version: in transitionToPending reset latestInterimText='' / latestInterimConfidence=null when a new pending turn begins, and add the same two resets before `return` at line 222.
files: packages/voice/src/turn-arbiter.ts:71-72 (fields), :167-180 (transitionToPending - add reset), :204-222 (tryCommit read + uncleared early-return), :76-79 (noteInterimEvidence - thread contextId); packages/voice/src/voice-agent-session.ts:568,585 (emit sites pass pkt.contextId)
